title: Growth and survival of firms
summary: 9708 AS firm growth — internal vs external, mergers, and survival strategies.

simpleExplanation.title: Why firms grow
simpleExplanation.summary: Growth can cut costs, increase market power, or diversify risk — but integration has costs and regulatory limits.

sections.content: **Growth and survival** (7.7) connects **7.5 costs** to **market structure**. Use **real merger examples** in essays.
